creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 190814
patch

* update to r6675,
* please portlint by moving BROKEN_aarch64,
* add USES=dos2unix, needed by files/patch-source_build_include_collections.h (svnlite doesn't accept CRLF endings),
* add files/patch-source_build_include_collections.h (needed by Clang).

Tested on 10.3-RELEASE with Poudriere (both GCC and Clang).
